hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); case "$f" in *vendor/automattic/agents-api/*) echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"vendor/automattic/agents-api/ is the pinned upstream copy. Edits here get wiped on the next composer update + never land canonical. Edit Automattic/agents-api directly, open a PR, then bump the pin via the /agents-api-sync skill."}'; exit 0 ;; esac

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); case "$f" in "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"/includes/*.php|"$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"/openclawp.php) cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && php tests/smoke.php >&2 || { echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"php tests/smoke.php failed after editing '"$f"'. Plugin will fatal at load. Inspect the smoke output above before continuing."}' ; exit 0; } ;; esac
